global_description: Large mammal with a distinctive hump on its back, long legs, and a long neck. Its body is covered with short, sandy-colored fur, adapted for desert environments. The face features a long snout and large eyes with long eyelashes. The feet are broad and padded, suitable for walking on sand.

part_details.hump: Large, rounded, located on the back
part_details.neck: Long and curved, connecting head to body
part_details.head: Long snout, large eyes with long eyelashes
part_details.feet: Broad and padded, adapted for sand

spatial_relations: Neck extends from body to head
